description.en: The contents of the `/etc/issue` file are displayed to users prior to login for local terminals.

rationale.en: **\- IF \-** the `/etc/issue` file does not have the correct access configured, it could be modified by unauthorized users with incorrect or misleading information.

audit.en:
Run the following commands to set mode, owner, and group on `/etc/issue`:

```
# chown root:root $(readlink -e /etc/issue)
# chmod u-x,go-wx $(readlink -e /etc/issue)
```

remediation.en:
Run the following commands to set mode, owner, and group on `/etc/issue`:

```
# chown root:root $(readlink -e /etc/issue)
# chmod u-x,go-wx $(readlink -e /etc/issue)
```
